scripts.setup: rindle migrate apply && rindle schema gen --out shared/schema.ts
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n daemon,web -c blue,green "rindle up --migrate --gen shared/schema.ts --watch" "pnpm dev:web"
scripts.preview:cf: CF=1 vite build && CF=1 vite preview
scripts.deploy: CF=1 vite build && wrangler deploy -c dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.// deploy:pro: OFFICIAL deploy — the open-source app + the private commercial overlay (marketing + Stripe) as ONE Worker. Requires the git-ignored commercial/ overlay present. See docs/COMMERCIAL_OVERLAY.md.
scripts.deploy:pro: wrangler d1 migrations apply strut-auth --remote -c commercial/wrangler.jsonc && STRUT_COMMERCIAL=commercial/index.ts WRANGLER_CONFIG=commercial/wrangler.jsonc CF=1 vite build && wrangler deploy -c dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.preview:pro: STRUT_COMMERCIAL=commercial/index.ts WRANGLER_CONFIG=commercial/wrangler.jsonc CF=1 vite build && CF=1 vite preview
scripts.// dev:pro: LOCAL dev of app + commercial overlay in ONE workerd server (CF=1 vite dev). Marketing → http://localhost:3000, app → http://localhost:3000/app. Needs the git-ignored commercial/ overlay + commercial/.dev.vars (BETTER_AUTH_SECRET etc.). See commercial/README.md.
scripts.dev:pro:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply strut-auth --local --persist-to .wrangler/state -c commercial/wrangler.dev.jsonc
scripts.dev:pro: pnpm dev:pro:migrate && concurrently -k -n daemon,web -c blue,green "rindle up --migrate --gen shared/schema.ts --watch" "STRUT_COMMERCIAL=commercial/index.ts WRANGLER_CONFIG=commercial/wrangler.dev.jsonc CF=1 vite dev --port 3000"
scripts.// rindle:deploy: Ensure/re-attach the managed Rindle app on headwaters (reads topology.ncl + .rindle/cloud.json). Run `rindle login` once first. Provisions nothing new — the binding re-attaches to app_a218b5eae4fd49bc.
scripts.// rindle:migrate:remote: Push migrations/ (Rindle schema) to the DEPLOYED daemon via the authenticated control-plane proxy. Separate from migrate:db:* which target the auth D1.
